Stories Tagged "Map Memory"

A focused archive path for Map Memory, collecting 4 related Kyunolab records across 1 shelf.

Legendary Places

The Cave Chapel With a Tide Calendar: A Legendary Place Explained

A measured Kyunolab record tracing an inland cave chapel preserves a calendar organized around sea tides.

Legendary Places

The Crossroads Shrine Moved by Every New Map: History, Folklore, and Local Memory

A measured Kyunolab record tracing maps place the same roadside shrine at slightly different crossroads.

Legendary Places - 9 min read
Legendary Places

The Lost Garden Behind the Railway Wall: A Legendary Place Record

A source-aware entry centered on a garden is remembered behind a railway wall where survey maps show only gravel.

Legendary Places - 10 min read
Legendary Places

The Orchard Island Seen From the Wrong Shore: A Legendary Place Record

A source-aware entry centered on an orchard island is visible only from the shore where maps show open water.
